Color.description: CSS color value in hex, RGB, HSL, or named color format

Number.description: Numeric value with optional CSS unit like px, em, rem, %, or unitless

String.description: Text value, either quoted for content properties or unquoted for identifiers

Boolean.description: Logical value used in @if conditions and function guards

Null.description: Represents no value; properties with null values are not emitted in output CSS

List.description: Ordered collection separated by commas or spaces, used for multi-value properties

Map.description: Collection of key-value pairs for structured configuration data

Function.description: Custom SCSS function that computes and returns a value
